Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp

Class EphemeralStore

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp.EphemeralStore
public class EphemeralStore extends Object
Single-use, TTL-bounded store for the per-login state → (nonce, codeVerifier, redirectTarget) association created during OidcRelyingParty.startLogin(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse) and consumed during OidcRelyingParty.completeLogin(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse).

Security properties (see OpenID Connect Core §3.1.2.1 and the RP charter):

  • Single-use — consume(String) atomically removes the entry, so a replayed callback with the same state fails.
  • TTL-bounded — entries older than the configured TTL are treated as a miss and swept.
  • Size-bounded — an LRU cap (default 10 000) prevents unbounded growth from abandoned login attempts; eviction mirrors the BoundedLruTokenCache shape.

Thread-safe.

Since:
10.0.0

    Description
    static final record 
    EphemeralStore.PendingLogin
    A pending-login association awaiting the IdP callback.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES
    Default maximum number of in-flight login attempts retained.
    static final Duration
    DEFAULT_TTL
    Default time-to-live for a pending login (the user has at most a few minutes at the IdP).

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES

      public static final int DEFAULT_MAX_ENTRIES
      Default maximum number of in-flight login attempts retained.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_TTL

      public static final Duration DEFAULT_TTL
      Default time-to-live for a pending login (the user has at most a few minutes at the IdP).

  • Constructor Details

    • EphemeralStore

      public EphemeralStore(Duration ttl, int maxEntries, Clock clock)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      ttl - The single-use TTL. Must be positive and not exceed 30 minutes.
      maxEntries - The LRU size cap. Must be positive.
      clock - The clock for TTL comparisons. Must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • store

      public void store(String state, String nonce, String codeVerifier, String redirectTarget)
      Stores a pending-login association keyed by state.
      Parameters:
      state - The opaque state value. Must not be null or blank.
      nonce - The OIDC nonce. Must not be null or blank.
      codeVerifier - The PKCE code_verifier. Must not be null or blank.
      redirectTarget - The post-login redirect target. May be null.

    • consume

      public Optional<EphemeralStore.PendingLogin> consume(String state)
      Atomically removes and returns the pending-login association for state, if present and not expired.
      Parameters:
      state - The state value from the callback. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      The association, or Optional.empty() if absent or expired.

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the current entry count. Primarily for tests and metrics.
      Returns:
      The entry count.
